description: The messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView is called in a useEffect that depends on localMessages, but there's no check if the scroll is already at the bottom. This can interrupt user scrolling if they're reading previous messages. Add auto-scroll only if user is already near the bottom.
successCriteria: Auto-scroll only triggers if user is within 100px of the bottom
User can scroll up to read history without being interrupted
New messages still auto-scroll when user is at the bottom
